This game is wonderful! It's got some great potential, (ignoring the glitches and interesting choices with in-game purchables *cough cough* $50 moderator *cough cough*) and i think its a great game to play when you are bored and want to have a great time! Horror mode isn't the greatest, as the second level is just straight up confusing, and the first level's AI just camps the forcefield, but I still think that aside these problems, the game is a great ad solid game that will leave you amazed. Great job, Edivence!
